replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from SendGrid.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: UTC date and time in the format 2017-01-25T00:00:00Z. Any data before this date will not be replicated.

custom_description: Connector for the Twilio SendGrid v3 API. Provides read access to marketing campaigns, contacts, lists, segments, single sends, transactional templates, and suppression management (bounces, blocks, spam reports, invalid emails, global suppressions, suppression groups, and suppression group members).
supported_questions:
- List all marketing contacts
- Get the details of a specific contact
- Show me all marketing lists
- List all transactional templates
- Show all single sends
- List all bounced emails
- Show all blocked email addresses
- List all spam reports
- Show all suppression groups
- How many contacts are in each marketing list?
- Which single sends were scheduled in the last month?
- What are the most common bounce reasons?
- Show me contacts created in the last 7 days
unsupported_questions:
- Send an email
- Create a new contact
- Delete a bounce record
- Update a marketing list

first_operation.description: Returns a sample of contacts. Use the export endpoint for full lists.

contacts.description: Returns a sample of contacts. Use the export endpoint for full lists.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the contact

contacts.description: Returns the full details and all fields for the specified contact.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of lists to return

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the list

lists.description: Returns a specific marketing list by ID.

parameters.name: segment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the segment

segments.description: Returns a specific segment by ID.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of campaigns to return per page

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of single sends to return per page

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the single send

singlesends.description: Returns details about one single send.

parameters.name: generations
parameters.description: Template generations to return

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of templates per page

templates.description: Returns paged transactional templates (legacy and dynamic).

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the template

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of stats to return per page

singlesend_stats.description: Returns stats for all single sends.

suppression_group_members.description: Returns all suppressions across all groups.
